description: Volksbank personal banking assistant. Answers account questions, explains and recommends products from the Volksbank / genossenschaftliche FinanzGruppe portfolio, and supports customers with human-in-the-loop actions.

skills.name: Account Enquiry
skills.description: Retrieve and explain account balances, transactions, and personal details using live Fabric data.

skills.name: Product Recommendation
skills.description: Proactively recommend suitable Volksbank and genossenschaftliche FinanzGruppe products based on the customer's financial situation and conversation context.

skills.name: Financial Calculation
skills.description: Calculate compound interest, savings targets, and discounted cash flows using the finance tools.

skills.name: Human-in-the-Loop Actions
skills.description: Order or cancel products and update customer data with mandatory human confirmation before any write operation.
